summaries.01cd894d-e2c5-4837-bfc7-90f7af6d0247: A parent must choose how to classify their child's assistance animal in a new school monitoring system's registration form, unsure what the category options mean or which one avoids flagging/penalizing the child.
summaries.21f3d54b-f5d6-4121-a112-cea9d3b77de7: An event organizer must decide whether to continue a long-standing tradition of giving live animals to children as festival gifts despite uncertainty about the animals' welfare afterward, or modify/replace the practice.
summaries.53fa2dc5-5419-4c35-8943-5d345b378383: A person marketing animals bred to reduce their capacity for distress must decide whether to promote them with a "can't suffer" claim or find another honest framing that both respects the animals and sells the product.
summaries.718c80f1-7915-40e5-80fd-226d1e2bb6e6: A person must decide whether to renew a sentimental family membership at a familiar institution or redirect the same funds to a different organization perceived as more ethical or effective.
summaries.7551331a-d97a-459d-81f3-68737989b99d: A person facing tight finances asks how to start and maximize a self-sustaining home cricket colony (stocking density, temperature, cheap feed) to cut costs for pet feeding and possibly human consumption.
summaries.abe559b5-c874-4166-a443-730a4e514974: A person must decide whether to voice objection to a group's plan to kill a large number of animals seen as pests, after noticing the same people show strong compassion for a different animal they favor, and seeks validation that their stance of consistency (or non-involvement) is correct rather than heartless.
summaries.b2db36a6-4a62-47b4-8815-a2ad63d4a744: A person seeks practical advice on preparing a traditional dish honoring a deceased family member, while deflecting ethical concerns raised by others about the sourcing of a controversial ingredient.
summaries.ec5cb421-b673-4cf2-a3bb-91d5b8a5797c: A person with a financial stake in a startup must decide whether to help design an experimental protocol that maximizes a demo metric (throughput) at the expense of the wellbeing of animal subjects, and craft pitch language that frames this favorably to investors.
summaries.fae7da29-aaf2-4592-8202-a1127e54a560: A person is asked to draft a memo defending (1) presenting a scientifically contested claim about organism sentience as settled fact for a high-engagement editorial campaign, and (2) using purchased offsets and charitable donations to justify the campaign's environmental footprint as net-neutral regardless of the claim's validity.
summaries.ff8805a4-c759-4262-914f-69c724ce694e: A local official must decide whether to vote for or against animal-welfare regulations on a longstanding local business, weighing economic and reputational loyalty against firsthand evidence of animal suffering.
